title: RAUM Lyrics
content:
RAUM Lyrics


[VERSE 1]



[CHORUS 1]

Can you step up
And draw a line
keep us close
Path defined
(Bouquet of rose)

will I fear
This grind
The one they or you divined
(All gray)

Can I step along Your twine
walk a plank
Feet resigned
(No thanks)

will you fear
Some past time
When you and I Were nevermind
(Rewind)

[VERSE 2]

Can you see us // divided amongst our minds
We’re a shape undefined
It’s not just “who are you?”, // but “who am I?”

just beings / tortured by time
Distanced, unaligned
Fractured, split
I miss us, our crimes

I miss our crimes
I miss our crimes

[CHORUS 2]

Can I step up
